title: Define dashboard analytics summary
description: Agree on the status, overdue, and completion metrics for the first dashboard release.

title: Build task card component
description: Implement the reusable card layout for kanban and list view rendering.

title: Review drag-and-drop accessibility
description: Check keyboard alternatives, focus states, and accessible announcements for task movement.

title: Finalize theme tokens
description: Lock the light and dark color variables before wiring them into the CSS system.

title: Create offline queue schema
description: Design the IndexedDB structure for queued create, update, move, and delete actions.

title: Implement search debounce
description: Add debounced full-text search across titles, descriptions, labels, and assignees.

title: Write validation helpers
description: Codify task title, due date, and workflow transition rules for the form layer.

title: Prepare test fixtures
description: Create representative invalid input and edge cases for unit testing the store and validation logic.

title: Implement event bus
description: Expose on, off, once, and emit for cross-feature notifications and sync events.

title: Draft README architecture section
description: Document the store, event bus, sync flow, and queue conflict strategy.

title: Design custom confirmation dialog
description: Create the delete and destructive action dialog flow with keyboard support.

title: Implement request timeout handling
description: Use AbortController to fail slow requests predictably and surface normalized errors.

title: Tune analytics worker payload
description: Send only the minimal derived data needed to calculate counts and averages in the worker.

title: Create notification toast system
description: Show sync updates, validation feedback, and API failures in a consistent toast layer.

title: Create 1000-task generator
description: Build a dev-only utility that expands the seed data for stress testing and performance checks.

title: Stabilize kanban drag states
description: Show active drag feedback and update task ordering when a drop succeeds.

title: Audit responsive layout breakpoints
description: Verify the sidebar, toolbar, and list/kanban switch on tablet and mobile widths.

title: Add local preference persistence
description: Persist theme, filters, sort order, and active view in localStorage.

title: Write undo and redo commands
description: Capture create, update, delete, and move actions for keyboard-driven undo and redo.

title: Document queue conflict strategy
description: Explain how repeated offline edits to the same task should be merged before replay.

title: Validate review transition rule
description: Block tasks from moving to review if the description is empty.

title: Capture loading and error states
description: Display skeletons while loading and a recoverable error state when fetch fails.

title: Add list view columns
description: Expose compact task rows with actions for mobile and dense desktop scanning.

title: Implement fetch wrapper retry logic
description: Retry transient failures with bounded attempts and normalized error objects.

title: Prepare demo notes
description: Summarize online usage, offline actions, synchronization, undo and analytics for the walkthrough.
